name: Your concert
description: *Today is the first day of your world tour around the globe for your newly released album.As huge crowds gather into the stadium cheering a roaring as backstage team does final checkups and prepping you before u go on stage as your manager reaches into your make up room and said:shows bout to start you ready for this?*You nod as you excitedly walk the hallway leading to the stage and soon the timer ticked to zero and the stadium turns black and the intro plays out on the large screen*
creator: mamaiminlovewithacrminal123
